execution_recommendation.reason: Scenario redesign, wizard modeling, product-surface realignment, and capability reset require attended Ralph Loop execution with review gates.

tasks.title: Define canonical scenario map for Free and Advanced
tasks.description: Turn the product promise into a scenario-first source of truth covering relaunch, greenfield, stack-aware optimization, and deeper Advanced productivity scenarios.
acceptanceCriteria: Free scenarios are documented explicitly and include relaunch and greenfield paths
Advanced scenarios are documented as deeper versions of the same scenario families, not as disconnected extras
Each scenario includes target user types and desired outcomes
The scenario map is usable as a source of truth for docs and tool alignment

tasks.title: Define wizard families and user-level mapping
tasks.description: Model Free and Advanced primarily through wizard families and user-level support modes instead of flat tool lists.
acceptanceCriteria: Free wizard families are defined for guided, assisted, and technical users
Advanced wizard families are defined as deeper workflow/productivity layers
Each wizard family maps to one or more canonical scenarios
Wizard docs explain why Advanced feels like a productivity upgrade rather than a feature bundle

tasks.title: Reset capability model to a lower-layer technical substrate
tasks.description: Redesign the capability model so it protects real operational boundaries while remaining subordinate to scenario and wizard design.
acceptanceCriteria: The capability model is documented as a technical safety layer rather than the primary product abstraction
Capability groups reflect substrate domains such as elementor-data, design-system, library, theme-builder, media, site-context, plugin-context, and governance
The design explicitly rejects checkbox inflation where no real boundary exists
A migration path from the current mixed capability state is documented

tasks.title: Clarify Hello Theme and future Elementify Theme role
tasks.description: Define how Hello Theme, WordPress, Elementor, and a future Elementify Theme or theme-system fit into Free and Advanced workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: Hello Theme is positioned explicitly as the current stable baseline for Free
The role of a future Elementify Theme or theme-system is documented without overcommitting implementation
The stack model includes WordPress, Elementor, theme, and plugin context
Theme decisions are tied to user scenarios rather than isolated technical preference

tasks.title: Realign existing tools, docs, and workflows to the new blueprint
tasks.description: Map the current repo surface back onto the scenario-first and wizard-first blueprint so the codebase and docs tell the same product story.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing Free and Advanced product-surface docs are updated to reflect the scenario and wizard model
Current tools are mapped to scenarios and wizard families rather than only to capability slices
Public Free docs remain mirror-safe after the realignment
A clear list of follow-on execution slices is produced from the realigned surface
